parents.subject: LU-12187 lod: trivial EC cstripe/dstripe support

commit.subject: LU-12187 lod: Set cstripe/dstripe on data comp
commit.message:
LU-12187 lod: Set cstripe/dstripe on data comp

REVERTING

In order to make it easier to recognize a data comp
which has an associated parity component, we set
cstripe/dstripe on data components.

This will probably be merged into the preceding patch
once we've given it a quick look.

Test-Parameters: forjanitoronly
Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Iaf06e0e48f27277349d1c4d8720755ea2184a548
